content:
## Page Section / Title
1.1 Colors  
COMBINATION RULES  


## All Verbatim Text
- **Header**: "AISalon Brand Guidelines | by Sightbox"  
- **Section Title**: "1.1 Colors"  
- **Subsection Title**: "COMBINATION RULES"  
- **Body Copy**: "These are the correct applications of our logo on different backgrounds. It illustrates which options are allowed and which are not, ensuring a consistent and effective representation of the brand in various contexts."  
- **Column 1 (White Background)**:  
  - "aisalon" (black text)  
  - "BLACK OVER WHITE: ALLOWED. PERFECT CONTRAST"  
  - "aisalon" (white text, crossed out)  
  - "WHITE OVER WHITE: PROHIBITED. NO CONTRAST"  
  - "aisalon" (red text, crossed out)  
  - "AIS CYAN OR AIS RED OVER WHITE: PROHIBITED. ONLY BLACK OR WHITE ALLOWED."  
  - "aisalon" (green text, crossed out)  
  - "NON BRAND COLORS OR ACCENTS OVER WHITE: PROHIBITED. ONLY BLACK OR WHITE ALLOWED."  
- **Column 2 (Black Background)**:  
  - "aisalon" (black text, crossed out)  
  - "BLACK OVER BLACK: PROHIBITED. NO CONTRAST"  
  - "aisalon" (white text)  
  - "WHITE OVER BLACK: ALLOWED. PERFECT CONTRAST"  
  - "aisalon" (red text, crossed out)  
  - "AIS CYAN OR AIS RED OVER BLACK: PROHIBITED. ONLY WHITE ALLOWED."  
  - "aisalon" (green text, crossed out)  
  - "NON BRAND COLORS OR ACCENTS OVER BLACK: PROHIBITED. ONLY WHITE ALLOWED."  
- **Column 3 (AIS Cyan Background)**:  
  - "aisalon" (black text)  
  - "BLACK OVER AIS CYAN: ALLOWED. PERFECT CONTRAST"  
  - "aisalon" (white text, crossed out)  
  - "WHITE OVER AIS CYAN: PROHIBITED. ONLY BLACK ALLOWED."  
  - "aisalon" (red text, crossed out)  
  - "AIS CYAN OR AIS RED OVER AIS CYAN: PROHIBITED. ONLY BLACK ALLOWED."  
  - "aisalon" (green text, crossed out)  
  - "NON BRAND COLORS OR ACCENTS OVER AIS CYAN: PROHIBITED. ONLY BLACK ALLOWED."  
- **Column 4 (AIS Red Background)**:  
  - "aisalon" (black text)  
  - "BLACK OVER AIS CYAN: ALLOWED. PERFECT CONTRAST"  
  - "aisalon" (white text, crossed out)  
  - "WHITE OVER AIS CYAN: PROHIBITED. ONLY BLACK ALLOWED."  
  - "aisalon" (red text, crossed out)  
  - "AIS CYAN OR AIS RED OVER AIS RED: PROHIBITED. ONLY BLACK ALLOWED."  
  - "aisalon" (green text, crossed out)  
  - "NON BRAND COLORS OR ACCENTS OVER AIS RED: PROHIBITED. ONLY WHITE ALLOWED."  
- **Column 5 (AIS Green Background)**:  
  - "aisalon" (black text)  
  - "BLACK OVER NON BRAND COLORS: ALLOWED. (DEPENDING ON CONTRAST)"  
  - "aisalon" (white text, crossed out)  
  - "WHITE OVER NON BRAND COLORS OR ACCENTS: ALLOWED. (DEPENDING ON CONTRAST)"  
  - "aisalon" (red text, crossed out)  
  - "AIS CYAN OVER NON BRAND COLORS OR ACCENTS: PROHIBITED. ONLY BLACK OR WHITE ALLOWED."  
  - "aisalon" (green text, crossed out)  
  - "NON BRAND COLORS OR ACCENTS OVER NON BRAND COLORS OR ACCENTS: PROHIBITED. ONLY BLACK OR WHITE ALLOWED."  
- **Column 6 (Image Background)**:  
  - "aisalon" (black text)  
  - "BLACK OVER IMAGES OR GRAPHICS: ALLOWED. (DEPENDING ON CONTRAST)"  
  - "aisalon" (white text, crossed out)  
  - "WHITE OVER IMAGES OR GRAPHICS: ALLOWED. (DEPENDING ON CONTRAST)"  
  - "aisalon" (red text, crossed out)  
  - "AIS CYAN OR AIS RED OVER IMAGES OR GRAPHICS: PROHIBITED. ONLY BLACK OR WHITE ALLOWED."  
  - "aisalon" (green text, crossed out)  
  - "NON BRAND COLORS OR ACCENTS OVER IMAGES OR GRAPHICS: PROHIBITED. ONLY BLACK OR WHITE ALLOWED."  


## Visual Elements
- **Logos**:  
  - The "aisalon" logo is displayed in multiple color variations (black, white, red, green) across different background colors.  
  - Each logo instance is accompanied by a red "X" (crossed out) to indicate prohibited usage.  
  - Clear space: No explicit clear space rules shown, but the logo is centered vertically and horizontally within each column.  
  - Minimum size: Not specified, but the logo is large enough to be legible in each column.  
- **Color Palette**:  
  - **White**: #FFFFFF (used as a background in Column 1)  
  - **Black**: #000000 (used as a background in Column 2)  
  - **AIS Cyan**: #00FFFF (used as a background in Column 3)  
  - **AIS Red**: #FF0000 (used as a background in Column 4)  
  - **AIS Green**: #00FF00 (used as a background in Column 5)  
  - **Image Background**: A photograph of a mountain road (Column 6)  
- **Typography**:  
  - Typeface: The "aisalon" logo uses a sans-serif typeface (exact name not specified).  
  - Weights: The logo is displayed in black (normal), white (normal), red (normal), and green (normal) weights.  
  - Sample Text: "aisalon" (repeated across all columns).  
- **Imagery / Photography**:  
  - Column 6 features a landscape photograph of a mountain road (snow-capped mountain, paved road, grassy fields, clear sky).  
  - Style: Realistic, high-resolution, natural lighting.  
  - Mood: Calm, expansive, professional.  
- **Iconography**:  
  - Red "X" icons (crossed out) are used to indicate prohibited logo applications.  
  - Style: Simple, bold, diagonal lines (two lines forming an "X").  
- **Layout Grid**:  
  - 6 vertical columns (equal width) spanning the page width.  
  - Columns are separated by thin white lines.  
  - Margins: Narrow left/right margins (approximately 1–2% of page width).  
  - Spacing: Consistent vertical spacing between logo instances (approximately 20–25% of column height).  
- **Geometric / Decorative Elements**:  
  - Red "X" icons (crossed out) are the primary decorative element, used to highlight prohibited logo applications.  
  - No other geometric shapes or patterns are visible.  


## Page Layout Summary
- The page is divided into 6 vertical columns of equal width, each with a distinct background color (or image).  
- The leftmost column (Column 1) contains the section title ("1.1 Colors") and body copy, while Columns 2–6 display logo usage examples.  
- Each column is structured with the "aisalon" logo (in different colors) at the top, followed by usage rules (allowed/prohibited) and a red "X" for prohibited applications.  
- The layout is symmetrical, with consistent spacing between logo instances and text within each column.  


## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page
- **Logo Color on Backgrounds**:  
  - Black logo on white: Allowed (perfect contrast).  
  - Black logo on black: Prohibited (no contrast).  
  - Black logo on AIS Cyan: Allowed (perfect contrast).  
  - Black logo on AIS Red: Allowed (perfect contrast).  
  - Black logo on non-brand colors: Allowed (depending on contrast).  
  - Black logo on images/graphics: Allowed (depending on contrast).  
  - White logo on white: Prohibited (no contrast).  
  - White logo on black: Allowed (perfect contrast).  
  - White logo on AIS Cyan: Prohibited (only black allowed).  
  - White logo on AIS Red: Prohibited (only black allowed).  
  - White logo on non-brand colors: Allowed (depending on contrast).  
  - White logo on images/graphics: Allowed (depending on contrast).  
  - Red logo on white: Prohibited (only black or white allowed).  
  - Red logo on black: Prohibited (only white allowed).  
  - Red logo on AIS Cyan: Prohibited (only black allowed).  
  - Red logo on AIS Red: Prohibited (only black allowed).  
  - Red logo on non-brand colors: Prohibited (only black or white allowed).  
  - Red logo on images/graphics: Prohibited (only black or white allowed).  
  - Green logo on white: Prohibited (only black or white allowed).  
  - Green logo on black: Prohibited (only white allowed).  
  - Green logo on AIS Cyan: Prohibited (only black allowed).  
  - Green logo on AIS Red: Prohibited (only white allowed).  
  - Green logo on non-brand colors: Prohibited (only black or white allowed).  
  - Green logo on images/graphics: Prohibited (only black or white allowed).  
- **Non-Brand Colors/Accents**:  
  - Non-brand colors or accents over white: Prohibited (only black or white allowed).  
  - Non-brand colors or accents over black: Prohibited (only white allowed).  
  - Non-brand colors or accents over AIS Cyan: Prohibited (only black allowed).  
  - Non-brand colors or accents over AIS Red: Prohibited (only white allowed).  
  - Non-brand colors or accents over non-brand colors: Prohibited (only black or white allowed).  
  - Non-brand colors or accents over images/graphics: Prohibited (only black or white allowed).
